name: Tramline
description: Tramline — Mobile release automation platform for coordinating iOS and Android app releases across branching, CI, and store submissions.

seo.title: Tramline — Release / App Store Operations
seo.meta_description: Tramline: Tramline — Mobile release automation platform for coordinating iOS and Android app releases across branching, CI, and store submissions.

when_to_use: Coordinating iOS and Android release branches in one platform
Automating CI integration and App Store/Play Store submissions
Mobile release workflow management across squads and schedules

pros: Coordinates iOS and Android releases end to end
Automates branching, tagging, and store submissions
Integrates with common CI and VCS providers
cons: Opinionated workflow may not fit every team
Smaller user base than Fastlane ecosystem
Setup requires real investment to get value
review.verdict: Promising release orchestration for mobile, but you have to buy into its model; still less mature than Fastlane-based stacks.
review.best_for: Mobile teams tired of hand-rolled Fastlane release pipelines
review.not_for: Small teams with simple release flows, or very bespoke processes

developer_experience.reason: Good docs for mobile release automation
